name: Possible Active Directory Enumeration via AD Module
description: Enumeration of Active Directory via PowerShell’s AD module is detected.

prompts.prompt: Investigate the security event: 'Possible Active Directory Enumeration via AD Module'. Event details: {event_details}

parameters.name: event_details
parameters.description: Details of the detected security event, including the original query information: `norm_id=WinServer event_id=4103 command="Get-ADComputer" payload="*DNSHostName*LastLogonDate*"`.
